implementing_department: Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: Provides financial assistance to differently-abled students studying in classes 1 to 8 for the purchase of books and notebooks.
eligibility: Not availing similar assistance from other sources

steps: Collect application form from District Differently Abled Welfare Office
Fill application and attach required documents
Submit to the District Welfare Officer

documents_required: Certificate from Headmaster stating no similar assistance availed
additional_notes: Scholarship is specifically for notebooks and study materials.
